approach: THESIS QUALITY FOCUS (high-quality data for proof-of-concept validation)

parameters.MIN_PERIODS_rationale: 105 brands have ≥40 non-zero periods (43.4% — HIGH QUALITY). Thesis focus: fewer high-quality brands > more low-quality brands.
parameters.LAGS_rationale: Empirically derived: lags with |r|>0.1 in ≥50% of 119 stable brands. Cross-checked against ACF/PACF consensus.
parameters.ROLLING_WINDOWS_rationale: Empirically selected via predictive correlation with t+1 sales; collinearity-pruned at r>0.95
parameters.HOLIDAY_MONTHS_rationale: Top 25% sales months (≥73,180,889 units). Validated via seasonal decomposition.
parameters.TRAIN_END_rationale: 24m global train window; effective usable rows per brand = train_rows - 13 warmup
